description: Style NoteIn a myriad of colours, prints and patterns, our soft cotton t-shirts look as good as they feel. Up your glam quotient by wearing this graphic tee with a blazer for urban style.Product DetailsCharcoal grey t-shirt has a ribbed V- neck, short sleeves, branding in rubber print on the left chest and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash with similar coloursIron on reverse sideSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
